'''gahuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobund|dobund]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobund|dobund]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gahuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhithith|gæhithith]] || [[word:gæhithij|gæhithij]] || [[word:gæhithish|gæhithish]] || [[word:gæhithi|gæhithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahuhuthuth|gahuhuthuth]] || [[word:gahuhuthuj|gahuhuthuj]] || [[word:gahuhuthush|gahuhuthush]] || [[word:gahuhuthu|gahuhuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahuthuth|gahuthuth]] || [[word:gahuthuj|gahuthuj]] || [[word:gahuthush|gahuthush]] || [[word:gahuthu|gahuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahufthuth|gahufthuth]] || [[word:gahufthuj|gahufthuj]] || [[word:gahufthush|gahufthush]] || [[word:gahufthuf|gahufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahuthuthu|gahuthuthu]] || [[word:gahuthuju|gahuthuju]] || [[word:gahuthushu|gahuthushu]] || [[word:gahuthuku|gahuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahuthuth|gahuthuth]] || [[word:gahuthuj|gahuthuj]] || [[word:gahuthush|gahuthush]] || [[word:gahuthu|gahuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahuthuthul|gahuthuthul]] || [[word:gahuthujul|gahuthujul]] || [[word:gahuthushul|gahuthushul]] || [[word:gahuthukul|gahuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahuthuthuthu|gahuthuthuthu]] || [[word:gahuthujuju|gahuthujuju]] || [[word:gahuthushushu|gahuthushushu]] || [[word:gahuthuku|gahuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahuthuthun|gahuthuthun]] || [[word:gahuthujun|gahuthujun]] || [[word:gahuthushun|gahuthushun]] || [[word:gahuthukun|gahuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahuthuthuoro|gahuthuthuoro]] || [[word:gahuthujuoro|gahuthujuoro]] || [[word:gahuthushuoro|gahuthushuoro]] || [[word:gahuthukuoro|gahuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
